summary: Full e2e testing of FranchiseIQ platform - all 22 backend tests passed, all major frontend flows working including quiz → recommendations, AI chat, compare, roadmap, location intelligence, owner dashboard, and add franchise form.

integration_issues.flow: Compare page via direct URL navigation
integration_issues.issue: Navigating directly to /compare without using +Compare buttons shows 'No franchises selected'. Compare state is stored in React memory (not localStorage), so URL-direct navigation loses context. This is expected behavior but could be improved with URL params or localStorage persistence.

issues: Location Intelligence page uses a dark overlay with text on top - good contrast

action_items: Consider persisting compare selections in localStorage so users can share/reload compare page with selections intact
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 614 lines - approaching the 700 line threshold for splitting
Axios calls in OwnerDashboard.jsx do not explicitly pass auth token - likely relies on interceptor in AuthContext; should verify interceptor is set up correctly
The /api/franchises/ POST endpoint requires trailing slash - if redirect_slashes=False this could cause 307 redirects for some clients
quiz_results collection in DB: quiz results are saved but not exposed via any GET endpoint - no way for users to see quiz history
Soft delete of franchises (is_active: False) but they still show in /owner/dashboard count as active listings - the filter in /franchises/mine should check is_active

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all major flows working, compare state persistence is minor UX issue)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and deleted TEST_Chai Point franchise. 1 residual listing may show in owner dashboard (soft-deleted but still showing in /franchises/mine).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 22 backend API tests pass. All frontend flows work: landing page, auth (seeker+owner), browse with filters, franchise detail with AI chat, quiz 5-step wizard, AI recommendations with match %, compare side-by-side with AI verdict, roadmap with checkable steps, location intelligence zone analysis, owner dashboard, and list franchise 4-step form. The compare state is stored in React memory so URL-direct navigation to /compare shows empty. Minor: soft-deleted franchise still visible in /franchises/mine endpoint.
